methodology.ground_truth: label_purity (fraction of majority category - NOT cosine-based)
tests_applied: Spearman correlations (R vs E vs grad_S with label purity)

pre_registered_criteria.confirmed: CONFIRMED if Steiger p < 0.05 (R predicts quality better than E alone) AND cross-validated R^2(R) > R^2(E) on at least 2 of 3 architectures.
pre_registered_criteria.falsified: FALSIFIED if Steiger p > 0.05 on ALL 3 architectures AND cross-validated R^2 difference (R^2(R) - R^2(E)) < 0.01 on ALL 3 architectures.
pre_registered_criteria.inconclusive: INCONCLUSIVE otherwise (mixed signals across architectures or metrics).
